revisionDesc.p: Scraped from churchofjesuschrist.org, and converted to OSIS by the churchstudy-to-osis Python package.

div.title: A Selection from the Revelations, Translations, and Narrations of Joseph Smith First Prophet, Seer, and Revelator to The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

div.p:
Published by
The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
Salt Lake City, Utah, USA
An extract from the translation of the Bible as revealed to Joseph Smith the Prophet, June 1830–February 1831.

God reveals Himself to Moses—Moses is transfigured—He is confronted by Satan—Moses sees many inhabited worlds—Worlds without number were created by the Son—God’s work and glory is to bring to pass the immortality and eternal life of man.

chapter.verse: The words of God, which he Alma 12:30; Moses 1:42.spake unto Moses at a time when Moses was caught up into an exceedingly high Ex. 19:3; Ezek. 40:2; Rev. 21:10; Moses 1:42.mountain,

And he Ex. 3:6; 33:20 (11–23); John 1:18; Ether 3:15; Moses 1:11. TG God, Privilege of Seeing; Jesus Christ, Appearances, Antemortal; Vision.saw God Num. 12:8; Deut. 34:10; D&C 17:1. TG God, Manifestations of.face to face, and he Ex. 25:1. TG Communication.talked with him, and the Deut. 5:24; Moses 1:14 (13–14, 25). TG Glory; God, Glory of; Transfiguration.glory of God was upon Moses; therefore Moses could endure his presence.

And God spake unto Moses, saying: Behold, I am the Lord God Rev. 19:6. TG Jesus Christ, Power of.Almighty, and Isa. 63:16; D&C 19:10 (9–12); Moses 7:35. TG God, Eternal Nature of.Endless is my Ex. 3:15.name; for I am without beginning of days or end of years; and is not this endless?

And, behold, thou art my son; wherefore Moses 7:4.look, and I will show thee the Job 9:12.workmanship of mine Moses 7:32 (32–37).hands; but not all, for my Ps. 40:5; 92:5; Morm. 9:16 (16–20); D&C 76:114. TG God, Power of.works are without Ps. 111:8 (7–8); 1 Ne. 14:7; D&C 29:33; Moses 1:38.end, and also my Ps. 33:11; 2 Ne. 9:16; D&C 1:38 (37–39).words, for they never cease.

Wherefore, no man can behold all my TG God, Works of.works, except he behold all my TG Glory; Jesus Christ, Glory of.glory; and no man can TG God, Privilege of Seeing.behold all my Ex. 24:17; John 12:41. TG Celestial Glory.glory, and afterwards remain in the flesh on the earth.

And I have a work for thee, Moses, my son; and thou art in the Gen. 1:26; Deut. 18:15; Acts 3:22; 1 Ne. 22:21; Moses 1:16 (13–16).similitude of mine Moses 1:33.Only Moses 6:57.Begotten; and mine Only Begotten is and shall be the 1 Ne. 13:40. TG Jesus Christ, Savior.Savior, for he is full of John 1:17 (14, 17); 2 Ne. 2:6; Alma 13:9. TG Grace.grace and Moses 5:7.truth; but there is Deut. 32:17; 1 Kgs. 8:60; Isa. 44:8; 45:5 (5–22); 46:9.no God beside me, and all things are present with me, for I Isa. 48:3 (3–7); 1 Ne. 9:6; Moses 1:35. TG God, Foreknowledge of; God, Omniscience of.know them all.
And now, behold, this one thing I show unto thee, Moses, my son, for thou art in the world, and now I show it unto thee.

And it came to pass that Moses looked, and beheld the Moses 2:1.world upon which he was created; and Moses Moses 1:27.beheld the world and the ends thereof, and all the children of men which are, and which were created; of the same he greatly Ps. 8:3 (3–4).marveled and wondered.

And the Job 10:12.presence of God withdrew from Moses, that his TG Glory.glory was not upon Moses; and Moses was left unto himself. And as he was left unto himself, he Isa. 6:5; Acts 9:4; JS—H 1:20.fell unto the earth.

And it came to pass that it was for the space of many hours before Moses did again receive his natural Dan. 10:8 (8, 17); 1 Ne. 17:47; 19:20; Alma 27:17.strength like unto man; and he said unto himself: Now, for this cause I know that TG Mortality.man is Job 42:6 (1–6); Dan. 4:35; Hel. 12:7; Ether 3:2. TG Humility.nothing, which thing I never had supposed.

But now mine own eyes have Moses 1:2. TG God, Privilege of Seeing.beheld God; but not my Moses 6:36.natural, but my Moses 1:31.spiritual eyes, for my Ex. 33:20.natural eyes could not have D&C 67:10 (10–13).beheld; for I should have Ex. 19:21; D&C 67:11 (11–13).withered and Ex. 20:19.died in his presence; but his TG Glory.glory was upon me; and I beheld his Gen. 32:30; Moses 7:4.face, for I was Matt. 17:2 (1–8); D&C 137:1. TG Transfiguration.transfigured before him.

And it came to pass that when Moses had said these words, behold, Moses 4:4 (1, 4). TG Devil.Satan came Luke 4:2 (1–13); 2 Cor. 11:14 (13–15); Rev. 12:9 (7–9); 2 Ne. 1:18 (17–18); Moses 1:21; 6:49.tempting him, saying: Moses, son of man, worship me.

And it came to pass that Moses looked upon Satan and said: Who art thou? For behold, I am a Job 1:6; Isa. 14:12 (12–15).son of God, in the similitude of his Only Begotten; and where is thy D&C 88:24.glory, that I should worship thee?

For behold, I could not look upon God, except his Moses 1:2 (2, 25). TG Glory.glory should come upon me, and I were transfigured before him. But I Rev. 1:17.can look upon thee in the natural man. Is it not so, surely?

Blessed be the name of my God, for his TG God, Spirit of.Spirit hath not altogether withdrawn from me, or else where is thy glory, for it is darkness unto me? And I can judge between thee and God; for God said unto me: Matt. 4:10. TG Worship.Worship God, for him only shalt thou 1 Sam. 7:3; 3 Ne. 13:24.serve.
Get thee hence, Satan; deceive me not; for God said unto me: Thou art after the Moses 1:6. TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.similitude of mine Only Begotten.
And he also gave me commandments when he Ex. 19:3.called unto me out of the burning Ex. 3:2 (2–15).bush, saying: Moses 5:8.Call upon God in the name of mine Only Begotten, and worship me.

And again Moses said: I will not cease to call upon God, I have other things to inquire of him: for his TG Glory; Jesus Christ, Glory of.glory has been upon me, wherefore I can judge between him and thee. Matt. 4:10.Depart hence, Satan.
And now, when Moses had said these words, TG False Christs.Satan cried with a loud voice, and ranted upon the earth, and commanded, saying: I am the JS—M 1:6 (5–9).Only Begotten, worship me.

And it came to pass that Moses began to TG Fearful.fear exceedingly; and as he began to fear, he saw the bitterness of D&C 76:47 (44–47). TG Hell.hell. Nevertheless, JS—H 1:16 (15–16). TG Prayer.calling upon God, he received TG God, Power of; Strength.strength, and he commanded, saying: Depart from me, Satan, for this one God only will I worship, which is the God of TG Glory.glory.

And now Satan began to tremble, and the earth shook; and Moses received strength, and called upon God, saying: In the name of the Only Begotten, Moses 1:12.depart hence, Matt. 10:1. TG Spirits, Evil or Unclean.Satan.

And it came to pass that Satan cried with a loud voice, with weeping, and wailing, and Matt. 13:42 (41–42); Mosiah 16:2 (1–3).gnashing of teeth; and he departed hence, even from the presence of Moses, that he beheld him not.
And now of this thing Moses bore record; but because of Luke 11:52. TG Record Keeping.wickedness it is Moses 1:41.not had among the children of men.

And it came to pass that when Satan had departed from the presence of Moses, that Moses lifted up his eyes unto heaven, being filled with the 3 Ne. 11:32 (32, 36); Moses 8:24.Holy Ghost, which beareth record of the Father and the Son;

And calling upon the name of God, he beheld his TG Glory.glory again, for it was upon him; and he heard a Hel. 5:30; 3 Ne. 11:3.voice, saying: Blessed art thou, Moses, for I, the Almighty, have Abr. 3:23.chosen thee, and thou shalt be made stronger than many Ex. 14:21.waters; for they shall obey thy TG Priesthood, Authority.command as if thou wert Ex. 4:16.God.

And lo, I am TG Walking with God.with thee, even unto the end of thy days; for thou shalt Ex. 3:10 (7–12). TG Israel, Deliverance of.deliver my people from Ex. 20:2; Ps. 80:8; 1 Ne. 17:23 (23–25). TG Israel, Bondage of, in Egypt.bondage, even 1 Kgs. 8:53 (51, 53). TG Israel, Twelve Tribes of.Israel my Ps. 33:12.chosen.

And it came to pass, as the voice was still speaking, Moses cast his eyes and D&C 88:47 (45–47); Moses 1:8; 7:23; Abr. 3:21 (21–23). TG Vision.beheld the earth, yea, even all of it; and there was not a particle of it which he did not behold, TG Discernment, Spiritual; Holy Ghost, Mission of.discerning it by the TG God, Spirit of.Spirit of God.

And he beheld also the inhabitants thereof, and there was not a Moses 7:23.soul which he beheld not; and he discerned them by the Spirit of God; and their numbers were great, even numberless as the sand upon the sea shore.
And he beheld many lands; and each land was called Gen. 1:10. TG Earth, Dividing of.earth, and there were 1 Ne. 17:36.inhabitants on the face thereof.
And it came to pass that Moses called upon God, saying: Moses 2:1.Tell me, I pray thee, why these things are so, and by what thou madest them?

And behold, the glory of the Lord was upon Moses, so that Moses stood in the presence of God, and talked with him Deut. 5:4; Moses 1:11.face to face. And the Lord God said unto Moses: For mine own Isa. 45:18 (17–18); Eph. 3:11 (7–12); 2 Ne. 2:15 (14–30). TG Earth, Purpose of.purpose have I made these things. Here is TG God, Intelligence of.wisdom and it remaineth in me.

And by the John 1:3 (1–4); Heb. 1:2 (1–3); Rev. 19:13 (13–15); Jacob 4:9; Moses 2:1 (1, 5). TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.word of my power, have I created them, which is mine Only Begotten Son, who is full of Moses 5:7 (7–8). TG Grace.grace and truth.

And Job 9:9 (7–9); Ps. 8:3 (3–4); Amos 9:6; D&C 76:24; Moses 7:30 (29–31). TG Astronomy; Creation; God, Works of; World.worlds without number have I TG God, Creator.created; and I also created them for mine own purpose; and by the TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship; Jesus Christ, Jehovah.Son I TG Jesus Christ, Creator.created them, which is mine Moses 1:6.Only Begotten.
And the Moses 3:7.first man of all men have I called Abr. 1:3. TG Adam.Adam, which is 1 Cor. 15:45 (45–48); 2 Ne. 2:20 (19–20); D&C 27:11; 76:24; 138:38; Moses 4:26; 6:9.many.

But only an account of this earth, and the inhabitants thereof, give I unto you. For behold, there are many worlds that have passed away by the word of my power. And there are many that now stand, and innumerable are they unto man; but all things are numbered unto me, for they are mine and I 1 Ne. 9:6; D&C 38:2; 88:41; Moses 1:6; 7:36; Abr. 3:2 (1–16). TG God, Omniscience of.know them.

And it came to pass that Moses spake unto the Lord, saying: Be merciful unto thy servant, O God, and Moses 2:1.tell me concerning this earth, and the inhabitants thereof, and also the heavens, and then thy servant will be content.
And the Lord God spake unto Moses, saying: The Gen. 1:1; Moses 2:1; Abr. 4:1. TG Heaven.heavens, they are many, and they cannot be numbered unto man; but they are numbered unto me, for they are mine.
And as one earth shall pass away, and the heavens thereof even so shall another come; and there is no Moses 1:4.end to my works, neither to my words.

For behold, this is my Ps. 90:16; Matt. 5:48; Rom. 8:17 (14–21); 2 Ne. 2:15 (14–30); Alma 42:26; D&C 29:43 (42–44). TG God, Works of.work and my Micah 2:9; Mosiah 4:12; D&C 81:4 (3–4). TG Glory; Jesus Christ, Glory of.glory—to bring to pass the Moses 6:59. TG Immortality; Jesus Christ, Mission of; Resurrection.immortality and TG Eternal Life; Man, Potential to Become like Heavenly Father.eternal TG Earth, Purpose of.life of man.
And now, Moses, my son, I will speak unto thee concerning this earth upon which thou standest; and thou shalt Neh. 13:1 (1–3); 2 Tim. 3:16; 2 Ne. 29:11 (11–12).write the things which I shall speak.

And in a day when the children of men shall esteem my words as Moses 1:23.naught and 1 Ne. 13:26 (23–32).take many of them from the Ex. 17:14; 1 Ne. 5:11; 19:23.book which thou shalt write, behold, I will raise up another 2 Ne. 3:9 (7–19).like unto thee; and they shall be 1 Ne. 13:32, 39–40; D&C 9:2.had again among the children of men—among as many as shall believe.

(These words were Moses 1:1.spoken unto Moses in the mount, the name of which shall not be known among the children of men. And now they are spoken unto you. Show them not unto any except them that believe. Even so. Amen.)

div.p: God creates the heavens and the earth—All forms of life are created—God makes man and gives him dominion over all else.

chapter.verse: And it came to pass that the Lord spake unto Moses, saying: Behold, I Moses 1:30 (30, 36).reveal unto you concerning this TG Heaven.heaven, and this Moses 1:8.earth; D&C 76:80. TG Record Keeping; Scribe; Scriptures, Writing of.write the words which I speak. I am the Beginning and the End, the 1 Ne. 1:14.Almighty God; by mine Moses 1:32; Abr. 4:1.Only Begotten I TG Creation; Jesus Christ, Creator.created these things; yea, in the beginning I TG God, Creator; God, Works of.created the Gen. 1:1.heaven, and the earth upon which thou standest.

And the earth was without Jer. 4:23 (23–25).form, and void; and I caused TG Darkness, Physical.darkness to come up upon the face of the deep; and my TG God, Spirit of.Spirit Gen. 1:2; Abr. 4:2.moved upon the face of the water; for I am God.
And I, God, said: Let there be D&C 88:7 (6–13). TG Light [noun].light; and there was light.
And I, God, saw the light; and that light was Gen. 1:4; Abr. 4:4.good. And I, God, divided the TG Light [noun].light from the darkness.

And I, God, called the light Day; and the darkness, I called Night; and this I did by the Moses 1:32.word of my power, and it was done as I Ps. 33:9; 2 Cor. 4:6.spake; and the evening and the morning were the first Gen. 1:5.day.

And again, I, God, said: Let there be a See Abr., fac. 2, fig. 4 concerning the firmament or expanse. See also Gen. 1:6 (6–8); Moses 2:14–18.firmament in the midst of the water, and it was so, even as I spake; and I said: Let it divide the waters from the waters; and it was done;

And I, God, made the firmament and divided the Amos 9:6; Abr. 4:9 (9–10).waters, yea, the great waters under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament, and it was so even as I spake.

And I, God, called the firmament IE The whole expanse around about the earth, its atmosphere, and beyond are generically here called “Heaven.” The same word is also used sometimes to refer to paradise, to the dwelling place of God, and to the kingdoms of glory.Heaven; and the evening and the morning were the second day.
And I, God, said: Let the TG Earth, Dividing of.waters under the heaven be gathered together unto Gen. 1:9; Abr. 4:9.one place, and it was so; and I, God, said: Let there be dry land; and it was so.

And I, God, called the dry land IE The whole sphere or any of its parts above the seas is called “Earth.”Earth; and the gathering together of the waters, called I the Sea; and I, God, saw that all things which I had made were good.

And I, God, said: Let the earth bring forth Gen. 1:11 (11–12); Abr. 4:11 (11–12).grass, the herb yielding seed, the fruit tree yielding fruit, after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed should be in itself upon the earth, and it was so even as I spake.

And the earth brought forth grass, every herb yielding seed after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed should be in itself, after his Gen. 1:12.kind; and I, God, saw that all things which I had made were good;
And the evening and the morning were the third day.
And I, God, said: Let there be Ps. 104:19.lights in the firmament of the heaven, to divide the day from the night, and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and for years;
And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth; and it was so.

And I, God, made two great lights; the greater TG Light [noun].light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night, and the Gen. 1:16.greater light was the sun, and the lesser light was the moon; and the stars also were made even according to my word.
And I, God, set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,

And the TG Astronomy.sun to rule over the day, and the moon to rule over the night, and to divide the light from the TG Darkness, Physical.darkness; and I, God, saw that all things which I had made were good;
And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.
And I, God, said: Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life, and fowl which may fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.

And I, God, created great Gen. 1:21; Abr. 4:21.whales, and every living creature that moveth, which the waters brought forth abundantly, after their kind, and every winged fowl after his kind; and I, God, saw that all things which I had created were good.
And I, God, blessed them, saying: Be fruitful, and Gen. 1:22 (20–25); D&C 45:58; 132:63 (55–56, 63); Abr. 4:22.multiply, and fill the waters in the sea; and let fowl multiply in the earth;
And the evening and the morning were the fifth day.
And I, God, said: Let the earth bring forth the living creature after his kind, cattle, and creeping things, and beasts of the earth after their kind, and it was so;
And I, God, made the beasts of the earth after their kind, and cattle after their kind, and everything which creepeth upon the earth after his kind; and I, God, saw that all these things were good.

And I, God, said unto mine TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Only Begotten, which was with me from the TG Jesus Christ, Firstborn.beginning: Let TG Jesus Christ, Creator.us TG Man, Physical Creation of.make man in our Gen. 1:26 (26–28); Moses 6:9 (8–10); Abr. 4:26 (26–31).image, after our likeness; and it was so. And I, God, said: Let them have Gen. 1:26 (26–28); D&C 76:111 (110–12); 121:37 (34–46); Moses 5:1; Abr. 4:26 (26–28).dominion over the fishes of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.
And I, God, created man in mine own TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.image, in the image of mine Only Begotten created I him; male and female created I them.

And I, God, blessed them, and said unto them: Be TG Birth Control.fruitful, and Moses 5:2. TG Marriage, Fatherhood.multiply, and replenish the earth, and subdue it, and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over every living thing that moveth upon the earth.

And I, God, said unto man: Behold, I have given you every herb bearing seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree in the which shall be the fruit of a tree yielding seed; to you it shall be for Gen. 1:29 (29–30); Ps. 136:25; D&C 104:17 (15–18); Abr. 4:29 (29–30).meat.

And to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to everything that creepeth upon the earth, wherein I grant life, there shall be given every clean herb for meat; and it was so, even as I spake.

And I, God, saw everything that I had made, and, behold, all things which I had made were very Gen. 1:31; Moro. 7:12; D&C 59:17 (16–20).good; and the evening and the morning were the Ex. 20:11 (8–11); 31:17; Mosiah 13:19; Abr. 4:31.sixth day.

div.p: God created all things spiritually before they were naturally upon the earth—He created man, the first flesh, upon the earth—Woman is a help meet for man.

chapter.verse: Thus the TG Creation.heaven and the earth were finished, and all the Gen. 2:1; D&C 29:36; 38:1; 45:1; Abr. 5:1.host of them.

And on the seventh day I, God, ended my work, and all things which I had made; and I Gen. 2:2 (1–3); Abr. 5:2 (1–3). TG Rest.rested on the TG Sabbath.seventh day from all my work, and all things which I had made were finished, and I, God, saw that they were good;

And I, God, Ex. 20:11; Mosiah 13:19; D&C 77:12.blessed the seventh day, and Abr. 5:3 (1–3).sanctified it; because that in it I had rested from all my Ex. 31:15 (14–15); Mosiah 13:18 (16–19).work which I, God, had created and made.

And now, behold, I say unto you, that these are the generations of the heaven and of the earth, when they were Gen. 2:4 (4–5); Abr. 5:4 (4–5).created, in the day that I, the Lord God, made the Neh. 9:6.heaven and the earth,

And every plant of the field before it was in the earth, and every herb of the field before it grew. For I, the Lord God, Moses 6:51. TG Creation; God, Creator.created all things, of which I have spoken, D&C 29:31–34; Abr. 3:23. TG Life, Sanctity of; Spirit Creation.spiritually, before they were Moses 3:9. TG Man, Physical Creation of.naturally upon the face of the earth. For I, the Lord God, had not caused it to rain upon the face of the earth. And I, the Lord God, had TG Man, a Spirit Child of Heavenly Father.created all the children of men; and not yet a man to till the Gen. 2:5.ground; for in TG Heaven.heaven TG Man, Antemortal Existence of.created I them; and there was not yet flesh upon the earth, neither in the water, neither in the air;
But I, the Lord God, spake, and there went up a Gen. 2:6.mist from the earth, and watered the whole face of the ground.

And I, the Lord God, formed man from the Gen. 2:7; Moses 4:25 (25–29); 6:59; Abr. 5:7.dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the TG Breath of Life.breath of life; and TG Adam.man became a living Isa. 57:16. TG Soul.soul, the Moses 1:34.first flesh upon the earth, the first man also; nevertheless, all things were before created; but spiritually were they created and made according to my word.
And I, the Lord God, planted a garden eastward in Isa. 51:3. TG Eden.Eden, and there I put the man whom I had formed.

And out of the ground made I, the Lord God, to grow every tree, Moses 3:5.naturally, that is pleasant to the sight of man; and man could behold it. And it became also a TG Life, Sanctity of.living soul. For it was spiritual in the day that I created it; for it remaineth in the sphere in which I, God, created it, yea, even all things which I prepared for the use of man; and man saw that it was good for food. And I, the Lord God, planted the Gen. 2:9; 1 Ne. 11:25; 15:22 (22, 28, 36); Alma 42:5 (2–6); Moses 4:28 (28, 31); Abr. 5:9.tree of life also in the midst of the garden, and also the tree of knowledge of good and evil.
And I, the Lord God, caused a river to go out of TG Eden.Eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted, and became into four Gen. 2:10.heads.
And I, the Lord God, called the name of the first Pison, and it compasseth the whole land of Gen. 2:11.Havilah, where I, the Lord God, created much gold;
And the gold of that land was good, and there was bdellium and the Ex. 25:7.onyx stone.

And the name of the second river was called Gihon; the same that compasseth the whole land of IE In the area of Eden and Adam-ondi-Ahman there were rivers and lands that received names that were later attached to other lands and rivers. As to the location of Eden and its environs, see D&C 117:8–9. Gen. 2:13.Ethiopia.
And the name of the third river was Hiddekel; that which goeth toward the east of Assyria. And the fourth river was the Euphrates.
And I, the Lord God, took the man, and put him into the Garden of TG Eden.Eden, to dress it, and to keep it.
And I, the Lord God, commanded the man, saying: Of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat,

But of the tree of the TG Knowledge.knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it, nevertheless, thou mayest Moses 7:32. TG Agency.choose for thyself, for it is given unto thee; but, remember that I 2 Ne. 2:15.forbid it, for in the Abr. 5:13.day thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely Gen. 2:17; Moses 4:17 (17–19). TG Mortality.die.

And I, the Lord God, said unto mine TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Only Begotten, that it was not good that the man should be TG Family, Eternal.alone; wherefore, I will make an Gen. 2:18; Abr. 5:14.help meet for him.

And out of the ground I, the Lord God, formed every Prov. 12:10; D&C 29:24 (24–25); 49:19 (18–21); 77:2. TG Creation.beast of the field, and every fowl of the air; and commanded that they should come unto Adam, to see what he would call them; and they were also living souls; for I, God, breathed into them the TG Breath of Life.breath of life, and commanded that whatsoever Adam called every living creature, that should be the name thereof.
And Adam gave TG Language.names to all cattle, and to the fowl of the air, and to every beast of the field; but as for Adam, there was not found an help meet for him.
And I, the Lord God, caused a deep sleep to fall upon Adam; and he slept, and I took one of his ribs and closed up the flesh in the stead thereof;
And the rib which I, the Lord God, had taken from man, made I a TG Creation; Woman.woman, and brought her unto the man.
And TG Adam.Adam said: This I know now is bone of my bones, and Gen. 2:23; Jacob 2:21; Abr. 5:17.flesh of my flesh; she shall be called Woman, because she was taken out of man.

Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother, and shall Gen. 2:24 (23–24); D&C 42:22; 49:15 (15–16); Abr. 5:18 (17–18).cleave unto his TG Family, Love within.wife; and Eccl. 4:9 (9–12).they shall be TG Divorce; Marriage, Celestial.one flesh.
And they were both naked, the man and his wife, and were not ashamed.

div.p: How Satan became the devil—He tempts Eve—Adam and Eve fall, and death enters the world.

chapter.verse: And I, the Moses 5:58.Lord God, spake unto Moses, saying: That D&C 29:36 (36–39); 76:25 (25–26); Abr. 3:27.Satan, whom thou hast commanded in the name of mine Only Begotten, is the same which was from the Moses 5:24.beginning, and he came before me, saying—Behold, here am I, send me, I will be thy son, and I will TG Redemption.redeem all mankind, that one soul shall not be lost, and surely Isa. 14:13 (12–15).I will do it; wherefore TG Selfishness.give me thine honor.

But, behold, my Beloved TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship; Witness of the Father.Son, which was my Beloved and Moses 7:39; Abr. 3:27. TG Foreordination; Jesus Christ, Authority of; Jesus Christ, Foreordained; Jesus Christ, Messenger of the Covenant; Jesus Christ, Messiah.Chosen from the beginning, said unto me—TG God the Father, Elohim.Father, thy Luke 22:42. TG God, the Standard of Righteousness.will be done, and the Ps. 96:8; John 7:18. TG Glory.glory be thine forever.

Wherefore, because that TG Sons of Perdition.Satan Abr. 3:28. TG Council in Heaven; Rebellion.rebelled against me, and sought to destroy the TG Agency.agency of man, which I, the Lord God, had given him, and also, that I should give unto him mine own power; by the power of mine Only Begotten, I caused that he should be D&C 76:25 (25–27).cast down;

And he became Moses 1:12.Satan, yea, even the TG Devil.devil, the father of all 2 Ne. 2:18; D&C 10:25. TG Honesty; Lying.lies, to 1 Thes. 3:5; D&C 29:39 (39–40, 47). TG Deceit.deceive and to blind men, and to lead them TG Bondage, Spiritual.captive at his will, even as many as would not TG Disobedience.hearken unto my voice.
And now the serpent was more Gen. 3:1; Mosiah 16:3; Alma 12:4; D&C 123:12.subtle than any beast of the field which I, the Lord God, had made.

And TG Devil.Satan put it into the heart of the serpent, (for he had drawn away D&C 29:36.many after him,) and he sought also to TG Honesty.beguile Eve, for he John 16:3 (1–3).knew not the 1 Cor. 2:16. TG Mind.mind of God, wherefore he sought to destroy the world.
And he said unto the woman: Yea, hath God said—Ye shall not eat of every tree of the garden? (And he spake by the mouth of the serpent.)
And the woman said unto the serpent: We may eat of the fruit of the trees of the garden;
But of the fruit of the tree which thou beholdest in the midst of the garden, God hath said—Ye shall not eat of it, neither shall ye touch it, lest ye die.
And the serpent said unto the 1 Tim. 2:14.woman: Ye shall not surely die;

For God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your Gen. 3:5 (3–6); D&C 76:12 (12, 19); Moses 5:10.eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be as gods, Alma 12:31. TG Knowledge.knowing good and evil.

And when the woman saw that the tree was good for food, and that it became pleasant to the eyes, and a tree to be Gen. 3:6; 1 Ne. 8:12 (10–15); 15:36.desired to make her wise, she took of the D&C 29:40.fruit thereof, and did TG Fall of Man.eat, and also gave unto her husband with her, and he did eat.
And the eyes of them both were opened, and they knew that they had been Gen. 2:25; 2 Ne. 9:14.naked. And they sewed fig leaves together and made themselves TG Apparel.aprons.

And they heard the voice of the Lord God, as they were Gen. 3:8.walking in the garden, in the cool of the day; and Adam and his wife went to hide themselves from the Jonah 1:3.presence of the Lord God amongst the trees of the garden.
And I, the Lord God, called unto Adam, and said unto him: Where Gen. 3:9.goest thou?
And he said: I heard thy voice in the garden, and I was afraid, because I beheld that I was naked, and I hid myself.
And I, the Lord God, said unto Adam: Who told thee thou wast naked? Hast thou eaten of the tree whereof I commanded thee that thou shouldst not eat, if so thou shouldst surely Moses 3:17.die?
And the man said: The woman thou gavest me, and commandest that she should remain with me, she gave me of the fruit of the tree and I did eat.
And I, the Lord God, said unto the woman: What is this thing which thou hast done? And the woman said: The serpent Gen. 3:13 (1–13); 2 Ne. 9:9; Mosiah 16:3; Ether 8:25.beguiled me, and I did eat.

And I, the Lord God, said unto the serpent: Because thou hast done this thou shalt be Gen. 3:14 (13–16).cursed above all cattle, and above every beast of the field; upon thy belly shalt thou go, and dust shalt thou eat all the days of thy life;
And I will put Gen. 3:15.enmity between thee and the woman, between thy seed and her seed; and he shall Ps. 68:21; Rom. 16:20; Heb. 2:14.bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.

Unto the woman, I, the Lord God, said: I will greatly multiply thy sorrow and thy conception. In Gen. 3:16. TG Pain.sorrow thou shalt bring forth children, and thy desire shall be to thy TG Marriage, Husbands; Marriage, Wives.husband, and he shall rule over thee.

And unto Adam, I, the Lord God, said: Because thou hast hearkened unto the voice of thy wife, and hast eaten of the fruit of the tree of which I commanded thee, saying—Thou shalt not eat of it, Job 14:1; Moses 8:9. TG Earth, Curse of.cursed shall be the ground for thy sake; in TG Suffering.sorrow shalt thou eat of it all the days of thy life.
Thorns also, and thistles shall it bring forth to thee, and thou shalt eat the herb of the field.

By the Gen. 3:19 (17–19). TG Mortality.sweat of thy Moses 5:1.face shalt thou eat bread, until thou shalt return unto the ground—for thou shalt surely die—for out of it wast thou taken: for Gen. 2:7; Job 10:9; Ps. 104:29; Alma 42:30; Moses 3:7; 6:59; Abr. 5:7.dust thou wast, and unto dust shalt thou return.
And Adam called his wife’s name Eve, because she was the mother of all living; for thus have I, the Lord God, called the first of all women, which are Moses 1:34; 6:9.many.
Unto Adam, and also unto his wife, did I, the Lord God, make coats of Gen. 27:16; Alma 49:6.skins, and TG Apparel; Clothing; Modesty.clothed them.

And I, the Lord God, Gen. 3:22.said unto mine Only Begotten: Behold, the TG Man, Potential to Become like Heavenly Father.man is become as one of us to TG Knowledge; Probation.know good and evil; and now lest he put forth his hand and Alma 42:5 (4–5).partake also of the Gen. 2:9; 1 Ne. 11:25; Moses 3:9; Abr. 5:9.tree of life, and eat and live forever,
Therefore I, the Lord God, will send him forth from the Garden of TG Eden.Eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken;
For as I, the Lord God, liveth, even so my 1 Kgs. 8:56; Jer. 44:28.words cannot return void, for as they go forth out of my mouth they must be fulfilled.
So I drove out the man, and I placed at the east of the Garden of TG Eden.Eden, Alma 42:3. TG Cherubim.cherubim and a flaming sword, which turned every way to keep the way of the tree of life.

(And these are the words which I spake unto my servant Moses, and they are true even as I will; and I have spoken them unto you. See thou show them unto no man, until I command you, except to them that believe. Amen.)

div.p: Adam and Eve bring forth children—Adam offers sacrifice and serves God—Cain and Abel are born—Cain rebels, loves Satan more than God, and becomes Perdition—Murder and wickedness spread—The gospel is preached from the beginning.

chapter.verse: And it came to pass that after I, the Lord God, had driven them out, that Adam began to till the earth, and to have Moses 2:26.dominion over all the beasts of the field, and to eat his bread by the sweat of his Moses 4:25.brow, as I the Lord had commanded him. And Eve, also, his wife, did TG Labor.labor with him.

And Gen. 5:4 (3–32).Adam knew his wife, and she bare unto him Gen. 4:1 (1–2); Moses 5:16 (16–17).sons and D&C 138:39.daughters, and they began to Gen. 9:1; Moses 2:28.multiply and to replenish the earth.

And from that time forth, the sons and Gen. 4:17; Moses 5:28.daughters of Adam began to divide two and two in the land, and to till the land, and to tend flocks, and they also begat sons and daughters.

And Adam and Eve, his wife, Gen. 4:26; Moses 6:4.called upon the name of the Lord, and they heard the voice of the Lord from the way toward the Garden of TG Eden.Eden, speaking unto them, and they saw him not; for they were shut out from his Alma 42:9.presence.

And he gave unto them commandments, that they should TG Worship.worship the Lord their God, and should offer the Ex. 13:12 (12–13); Num. 18:17; Mosiah 2:3. TG Firstborn.firstlings of their Moses 5:19 (19–20).flocks, for an offering unto the Lord. And Adam was TG Obedience.obedient unto the commandments of the Lord.

And after many days an TG Angels.angel of the Lord appeared unto Adam, saying: Why dost thou offer TG Ordinance; Sacrifice.sacrifices unto the Lord? And Adam said unto him: I know not, save the Lord commanded me.

And then the angel spake, saying: This thing is a TG Jesus Christ, Types of, in Anticipation.similitude of the Gen. 4:5 (3–7); 1 Chr. 6:49; Alma 34:10 (10–15); Moses 5:21 (20–26). TG Blood, Symbolism of; Jesus Christ, Atonement through.sacrifice of the Only Begotten of the Father, which is full of Moses 1:32. TG Grace.grace and Moses 1:6.truth.
Wherefore, thou shalt do all that thou doest in the Moses 1:17.name of the Son, and thou shalt Moses 6:57; 7:10. TG Repent.repent and TG Prayer.call upon God in the name of the Son forevermore.

And in that day the TG Holy Ghost, Baptism of.Holy Ghost fell upon Adam, which beareth record of the Father and the Son, saying: I am the TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Only Begotten of the Father from the beginning, henceforth and forever, that as thou hast TG Death, Spiritual, First; Fall of Man.fallen thou mayest be Ps. 49:15; Mosiah 27:24 (24–26); D&C 93:38; A of F 1:3. TG Redemption; Salvation, Plan of.redeemed, and all mankind, even as many as will.

And in that day Adam blessed God and was TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.filled, and began to D&C 107:56 (41–56).prophesy concerning all the families of the earth, saying: Blessed be the name of God, for because of my TG Transgress.transgression my Gen. 3:5 (3–6); D&C 76:12 (12, 19); Moses 4:11 (10–13).eyes are opened, and in this life I shall have TG Joy.joy, and again in the Job 19:26; 2 Ne. 9:4.flesh I shall see God.

And Eve, his wife, heard all these things and was glad, saying: Were it not for our transgression we never should have had 2 Ne. 2:23 (22–25). TG Birth Control; Family; Marriage, Motherhood.seed, and never should have Gen. 3:22.known good and evil, and the joy of our redemption, and the eternal life which God giveth unto all the obedient.
And Adam and Gen. 3:20; D&C 138:39.Eve blessed the name of God, and they made all things Deut. 4:9 (9–10).known unto their sons and their daughters.

And TG Devil.Satan came among them, saying: I am also a son of God; and he commanded them, saying: TG Spiritual Blindness; Unbelief.Believe it not; and they believed it not, and they Moses 5:28; 6:15.loved Satan more than God. And men began from that time forth to be TG Carnal Mind; Man, Natural, Not Spiritually Reborn.carnal, sensual, and devilish.
And the Lord God called upon men by the John 14:26 (16–26).Holy Ghost everywhere and commanded them that they should repent;

And as many as TG Faith.believed in the Son, and repented of their sins, should be TG Jesus Christ, Savior.saved; and as many as believed not and repented not, should be D&C 42:60.damned; and the words went forth out of the mouth of God in a firm decree; wherefore they must be fulfilled.

And Adam and Eve, his wife, ceased not to call upon God. And Adam knew Eve his wife, and she conceived and bare Gen. 4:1 (1–2).Cain, and said: I have gotten a man from the Lord; wherefore he may not reject his words. But behold, Cain 1 Sam. 3:13; 1 Ne. 2:12 (12–13); Mosiah 27:8 (7–37).hearkened not, saying: Who is the Lord that I should Ex. 5:2; Alma 9:6.know him?
And she again conceived and bare his brother Abel. And Abel Heb. 11:4.hearkened unto the voice of the Lord. And D&C 138:40.Abel was a keeper of sheep, but Cain was a tiller of the ground.
And Cain D&C 10:21 (20–21).loved Satan more than God. And Satan commanded him, saying: D&C 132:9 (8–11).Make an offering unto the Lord.
And in process of time it came to pass that Cain brought of the Moses 5:5.fruit of the ground an offering unto the Lord.
And Abel, he also brought of the Mosiah 2:3.firstlings of his flock, and of the fat thereof. And the Lord had TG Respect.respect unto Abel, and to his TG Sacrifice.offering;
But unto Cain, and to his Gen. 4:5 (3–7); Moses 5:7 (4–8).offering, he had not respect. Now Satan knew this, and it Moses 7:26.pleased him. And Cain was very wroth, and his countenance fell.
And the Lord said unto Cain: Why art thou wroth? Why is thy countenance fallen?

If thou doest well, thou shalt be Gen. 4:7; D&C 52:15; 97:8; 132:50.accepted. And if thou doest not well, sin lieth at the door, and Satan Gen. 4:7.desireth to have thee; and except thou shalt hearken unto my commandments, I will TG Bondage, Spiritual.deliver thee up, and it shall be unto thee according to his desire. And thou shalt Moses 5:30.rule over him;
For from this time forth thou shalt be the father of his TG Honesty.lies; thou shalt be called D&C 76:26, 32 (32–48). TG Sons of Perdition.Perdition; for thou wast also Moses 4:1.before the world.

And it shall be said in time to come—That these abominations were had from Hel. 6:27 (26–28).Cain; for he rejected the greater counsel which was had from God; and this is a Moses 5:36. TG Curse.cursing which I will put upon thee, except thou repent.
And Cain was wroth, and listened not any more to the voice of the Lord, neither to Abel, his brother, who walked in holiness before the Lord.
And Adam and his wife TG Mourning.mourned before the Lord, because of Cain and his brethren.
And it came to pass that Cain took one of his brothers’ daughters to Moses 5:3 (2–3).wife, and they Moses 5:13.loved Satan more than God.

And Satan said unto Cain: Matt. 5:36.Swear unto me by thy throat, and if thou tell it thou shalt die; and swear thy brethren by their heads, and by the living God, that they tell it not; for if they tell it, they shall surely die; and this that thy father may not know it; and this day I will deliver thy brother Abel into thine hands.
And Satan sware unto Cain that he would do according to his Moses 5:23.commands. And all these things were done in secret.

And Cain said: Truly I am Mahan, the master of this great Deut. 27:24.secret, that I may TG Murder.murder and get Deut. 27:25.gain. Wherefore Cain was called Master IE “Mind,” “destroyer,” and “great one” are possible meanings of the roots evident in “Mahan.”Mahan, and he gloried in his wickedness.
And Cain went into the field, and Cain talked with Abel, his brother. And it came to pass that while they were in the field, Cain rose up against Abel, his brother, and slew him.
And Cain TG Boast.gloried in that which he had done, saying: I am free; surely the TG Covet.flocks of my brother falleth into my hands.
And the Lord said unto Cain: Where is Abel, thy brother? And he said: I know not. Am I my brother’s Gen. 4:9 (8–15).keeper?
And the Lord said: What hast thou done? The voice of thy brother’s TG Life, Sanctity of.blood cries unto me from the ground.
And now thou shalt be D&C 29:41. TG Curse.cursed from the earth which hath opened her mouth to receive thy brother’s blood from thy hand.
When thou tillest the ground it shall not henceforth yield unto thee her TG Strength.strength. A Gen. 4:12 (11–12).fugitive and a vagabond shalt thou be in the earth.

And Cain said unto the Lord: Satan TG Covet; Temptation.tempted me because of my brother’s flocks. And I was wroth also; for his offering thou didst accept and not mine; my TG Punish.punishment is greater than I can bear.

Behold thou hast driven me out this day from the face of the Lord, and from thy face shall I be hid; and I shall be a fugitive and a vagabond in the earth; and it shall come to pass, that he that findeth me will slay me, because of mine iniquities, for these things are not hid from the Lord.
And I the Lord said unto him: Whosoever slayeth thee, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold. And I the Lord set a Gen. 4:15; Alma 3:7 (7–16).mark upon Cain, lest any finding him should kill him.
And Cain was TG Bondage, Spiritual.shut out from the Moses 6:49.presence of the Lord, and with his wife and many of his brethren dwelt in the land of Nod, on the east of Eden.

And Cain knew his wife, and she conceived and bare Enoch, and he also begat many sons and daughters. And he builded a city, and he called the name of the IE There was a man named Enoch in Cain’s lineage, and a city by that name among his people. Do not confuse these with the Enoch of the righteous line of Seth and with his city, Zion, also called “City of Enoch.”city after the name of his son, Enoch.

And unto Enoch was born Irad, and other sons and daughters. And Irad begat Mahujael, and other sons and daughters. And Mahujael begat Methusael, and other sons and daughters. And Methusael begat Lamech.
And Lamech took unto himself two wives; the name of one being Adah, and the name of the other, Zillah.

And Adah bare Jabal; he was the father of such as dwell in Moses 6:38; 7:5 (5–6).tents, and they were keepers of cattle; and his brother’s name was Jubal, who was the father of all such as handle the harp and organ.
And Zillah, she also bare Tubal Cain, an instructor of every artificer in brass and iron. And the sister of Tubal Cain was called Naamah.
And Lamech said unto his wives, Adah and Zillah: Hear my voice, ye wives of Lamech, hearken unto my speech; for I have slain a man to my wounding, and a young man to my hurt.

If Cain shall be avenged sevenfold, truly Lamech shall be IE Lamech presumptively boasted that far more would be done for him than for Cain. The reasons for his assumption are given in verses 49 and 50.seventy and seven fold;

For Gen. 4:24.Lamech having entered into a covenant with Satan, after the manner of Cain, wherein he became Master Mahan, master of that great secret which was administered unto Cain by Satan; and Irad, the son of Enoch, having known their secret, began to reveal it unto the sons of Adam;
Wherefore Lamech, being angry, slew him, not like unto Cain, his brother Abel, for the sake of getting gain, but he slew him for the TG Oath.oath’s sake.
For, from the days of Cain, there was a secret TG Secret Combinations.combination, and their works were in the dark, and they knew every man his brother.

Wherefore the Lord TG Curse.cursed Lamech, and his house, and all them that had covenanted with Satan; for they kept not the commandments of God, and it displeased God, and he ministered not unto them, and their works were abominations, and began to spread among all the Moses 8:14 (14–15, 19).sons of men. And it was among the sons of men.

And among the daughters of men these things were not spoken, because that Lamech had spoken the secret unto his wives, and they rebelled against him, and declared these things abroad, and had not compassion;
Wherefore Lamech was despised, and cast out, and came not among the sons of men, lest he should die.
And thus the works of TG Darkness, Spiritual.darkness began to prevail among all the sons of men.
And God TG Earth, Curse of.cursed the earth with a sore curse, and was angry with the wicked, with all the sons of men whom he had made;

For they would not TG Disobedience; Unbelief.hearken unto his voice, nor believe on his Only Begotten Son, even him whom he declared should Moses 7:46. TG Jesus Christ, Birth of.come in the meridian of time, who was TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.prepared from before the foundation of the world.

And thus the TG Gospel.Gospel began to be TG Preaching.preached, from the beginning, being declared by Alma 12:29 (28–30); Moro. 7:25 (25, 31).holy Acts 7:53.angels sent forth from the presence of God, and by his own voice, and by the gift of the Holy Ghost.

And thus all things were confirmed unto TG Adam.Adam, by an holy ordinance, and the Gospel preached, and a decree sent forth, that it should be in the world, until the end thereof; and thus it was. Amen.

div.p: Adam’s seed keep a book of remembrance—His righteous posterity preach repentance—God reveals Himself to Enoch—Enoch preaches the gospel—The plan of salvation was revealed to Adam—He received baptism and the priesthood.

chapter.verse: And Adam hearkened unto the voice of God, and called upon his sons to repent.

And Adam knew his wife again, and she bare a son, and he called his name Gen. 4:25.Seth. And Adam glorified the name of God; for he said: God hath appointed me another seed, instead of Abel, whom Cain slew.

And God revealed himself unto D&C 138:40.Seth, and he rebelled not, but offered an acceptable TG Sacrifice.sacrifice, like unto his brother Abel. And to him also was born a son, and he called his name Enos.
And then began these men to Gen. 4:26; Moses 5:4. TG Prayer.call upon the name of the Lord, and the Lord blessed them;

And a Abr. 1:28 (28, 31). TG Scriptures, Lost; Scriptures, Writing of.book of TG Book of Remembrance.remembrance was kept, in the which was recorded, in the Moses 6:46.language of Adam, for it was given unto as many as called upon God to write by the spirit of TG Guidance, Divine; Inspiration.inspiration;
And by them their TG Education; Family, Children, Responsibilities toward.children were taught to read and write, having a TG Language.language which was Zeph. 3:9.pure and undefiled.
Now this same TG Priesthood; Priesthood, History of; Priesthood, Melchizedek.Priesthood, which was in the beginning, shall be in the end of the world also.

Now this prophecy Adam spake, as he was moved upon by the Ex. 4:12 (12–16); 2 Pet. 1:21; D&C 24:6 (5–6); 28:4; Moses 6:32.Holy Ghost, and a TG Genealogy and Temple Work.genealogy was kept of the TG Sons and Daughters of God.children of God. And this was the Gen. 5:1.book of the generations of Adam, saying: In the day that God created man, in the likeness of God made he him;

In the Gen. 1:26 (26–28); Moses 2:26 (26–29); Abr. 4:26 (26–31).image of his own TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.body, male and female, TG Man, Physical Creation of.created he them, and blessed them, and called their Moses 1:34; 4:26.name Adam, in the day when they were created and became living TG Soul.souls in the land upon the Moses 6:44; Abr. 2:7.footstool of God.

And D&C 107:41 (41–56).Adam lived one hundred and thirty years, and begat a son in his own likeness, after his own IE Seth was in the likeness and image of Adam, as Adam was in the image of God. Gen. 5:3; D&C 107:42–43; 138:40.image, and called his name Seth.
And the days of Adam, after he had begotten Seth, were eight hundred years, and he begat many sons and daughters;
And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years, and he died.
Seth lived one hundred and five years, and begat Enos, and Moses 5:23.prophesied in all his days, and taught his son Enos in the ways of God; wherefore Enos prophesied also.
And Seth lived, after he begat Enos, eight hundred and seven years, and begat many sons and daughters.

And the children of Moses 8:14 (13–15).men were numerous upon all the face of the land. And in those days 3 Ne. 6:15.Satan had great Moses 5:13.dominion among men, and raged in their hearts; and from thenceforth came TG War.wars and bloodshed; and a man’s hand was against his own brother, in administering death, because of TG Conspiracy.secret TG Secret Combinations.works, seeking for Ether 8:23. TG Selfishness.power.
All the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years, and he died.

And Enos lived ninety years, and begat D&C 107:45, 53.Cainan. And Enos and the residue of the people of God came out from the land, which was called Shulon, and dwelt in a land of promise, which he called after his own son, whom he had named Moses 6:41.Cainan.
And Enos lived, after he begat Cainan, eight hundred and fifteen years, and begat many sons and daughters. And all the days of Enos were nine hundred and five years, and he died.

And Cainan lived seventy years, and begat Mahalaleel; and Cainan lived after he begat Mahalaleel eight hundred and forty years, and begat sons and daughters. And all the days of Gen. 5:14 (4–24); D&C 107:45 (45, 53).Cainan were nine hundred and ten years, and he died.

And Mahalaleel lived sixty-five years, and begat Jared; and Mahalaleel lived, after he begat Jared, eight hundred and thirty years, and begat sons and daughters. And all the days of Mahalaleel were eight hundred and ninety-five years, and he died.

And Jared lived one hundred and sixty-two years, and begat Gen. 5:22 (5–24); Moses 7:69; 8:1 (1–2).Enoch; and Jared lived, after he begat Enoch, eight hundred years, and begat sons and daughters. And Jared Moses 6:41.taught Enoch in all the ways of God.
And this is the genealogy of the sons of Adam, who was the Luke 3:38.son of God, with whom God, himself, conversed.

And they were Moses 6:13. TG Preaching.preachers of TG Righteousness.righteousness, and spake and Moses 8:3, 16. TG Prophets, Mission of.prophesied, and called upon all men, everywhere, to repent; and TG Faith.faith was TG Education.taught unto the children of men.
And it came to pass that all the days of Jared were nine hundred and sixty-two years, and he died.
And Enoch lived sixty-five years, and begat Methuselah.
And it came to pass that Enoch journeyed in the land, among the people; and as he journeyed, the TG God, Spirit of.Spirit of God descended out of heaven, and abode upon him.

And he heard a TG Guidance, Divine.voice from heaven, saying: Jude 1:14 (14–16).Enoch, my son, Moses 8:19.prophesy unto this people, and say unto them—Repent, for thus saith the Lord: I am Deut. 32:21; 2 Ne. 15:25; D&C 63:32.angry with this people, and my fierce anger is kindled against them; for their hearts have waxed TG Hardheartedness.hard, and their Ps. 78:1; 2 Ne. 9:31; Mosiah 26:28; D&C 1:14 (2, 11, 14).ears are dull of hearing, and their eyes Prov. 7:9; Alma 10:25; 14:6; Moses 7:26.cannot see afar off;

And for these many generations, ever since the day that I created them, have they gone astray, and have TG Rebellion.denied me, and have sought their own counsels in the dark; and in their own abominations have they devised murder, and have not kept the commandments, which I gave unto their father, Adam.
Wherefore, they have foresworn themselves, and, by their oaths, they have brought upon themselves death; and a Moses 7:37. TG Hell.hell I have prepared for them, if they repent not;

And this is a decree, which I have sent forth in the beginning of the world, from my own mouth, from the foundation thereof, and by the mouths of my servants, thy fathers, have I decreed it, even as it shall be sent forth in the world, unto the ends thereof.

And when Enoch had heard these words, he Ex. 34:8.bowed himself to the earth, before the Lord, and spake before the Lord, saying: Ex. 3:11 (10–21).Why is it that I have found favor in thy sight, and am but a lad, and all the people Jer. 11:19; Matt. 10:22; JS—H 1:20. TG Hate.hate me; for I am Ex. 4:10; Jer. 1:6 (6–9).slow of speech; wherefore am I thy servant?

And the Lord said unto Enoch: Go forth and do as I have commanded thee, and no man shall pierce thee. Open thy Ex. 4:12 (12–16); D&C 24:6 (5–6); 28:4; Moses 6:8; 7:13. TG Prophets, Mission of.mouth, and it shall be filled, and I will give thee utterance, for all flesh is in my hands, and I will do as seemeth me good.
Say unto this people: TG Agency.Choose ye TG Procrastination.this day, to serve the Lord God who made you.

Behold my TG Teaching with the Spirit.Spirit is upon you, wherefore all thy words will I justify; and the Judg. 5:5; Matt. 17:20; D&C 109:74; 133:22 (21–22, 40).mountains shall flee before you, and the Moses 7:13.rivers shall turn from their course; and thou shalt abide in me, and I in you; therefore Gen. 5:24; Moses 7:69. TG Walking with God.walk with me.
And the Lord spake unto Enoch, and said unto him: Anoint thine eyes with John 9:6 (6, 15).clay, and wash them, and thou shalt see. And he did so.

And he beheld the TG Man, Antemortal Existence of; Spirit Body; Spirit Creation.spirits that God had created; and he beheld also things which were not visible to the Moses 1:11.natural eye; and from thenceforth came the saying abroad in the land: A TG Seer.seer hath the Lord raised up unto his people.

And it came to pass that Enoch went forth in the land, among the people, standing upon the hills and the high places, and cried with a loud voice, testifying against their works; and all men were Matt. 11:6; 1 Ne. 16:2 (1–3); Mosiah 13:7.offended because of him.

And they came forth to hear him, upon the high places, saying unto the Moses 5:45; 7:5 (5–6).tent-keepers: Tarry ye here and keep the tents, while we go yonder to behold the seer, for he prophesieth, and there is a strange thing in the land; a Gen. 16:12; Matt. 3:4 (1–12).wild man hath come among us.

And it came to pass when they heard him, no man laid hands on him; for Luke 7:16; Alma 19:25 (24–27).fear came on all them that heard him; for he TG God, Privilege of Seeing; Walking with God.walked with God.
And there came a man unto him, whose name was Mahijah, and said unto him: Tell us plainly who thou art, and from whence thou comest?

And he said unto them: I came out from the land of Moses 6:17.Cainan, the land of my fathers, a land of TG Righteousness.righteousness unto this day. And my father Moses 6:21.taught me in all the ways of God.

And it came to pass, as I journeyed from the land of Cainan, by the sea east, I beheld a vision; and lo, the heavens I saw, and the Lord spake with me, and gave me commandment; wherefore, for this cause, to keep the commandment, I speak forth these words.

And Enoch continued his speech, saying: The Lord which spake with me, the same is the God of heaven, and he is my God, and your God, and ye are my brethren, and why Prov. 1:25 (24–33); D&C 56:14 (14–15).counsel ye yourselves, and deny the God of heaven?

The heavens he made; the Deut. 10:14; 1 Ne. 11:6; 2 Ne. 29:7; D&C 55:1.earth is his Moses 6:9; Abr. 2:7.footstool; and the foundation thereof is his. Behold, he laid it, an host of men hath he brought in upon the face thereof.
And death hath come upon our fathers; nevertheless we know them, and cannot deny, and even the first of all we know, even TG Adam.Adam.

For a book of TG Book of Remembrance; Genealogy and Temple Work.remembrance we have TG Scriptures, Writing of.written among us, according to the pattern given by the finger of God; and it is given in our own Moses 6:5.language.
And as Enoch spake forth the words of God, the people trembled, and could not 1 Ne. 17:48 (48–55).stand in his presence.
And he said unto them: Because that Adam 2 Ne. 2:25. TG Fall of Man.fell, we are; and by his fall came TG Death; Mortality.death; and we are made partakers of misery and woe.

Behold Satan hath come among the children of men, and Moses 1:12. TG Temptation.tempteth them to TG Worship.worship him; and men have become Mosiah 16:3 (3–4); Moses 5:13. TG Carnal Mind; Man, Natural, Not Spiritually Reborn.carnal, TG Sensuality.sensual, and devilish, and are shut out from the Gen. 4:16; Moses 5:41.presence of God.
But God hath made known unto our fathers that all men must repent.
And he called upon our father Adam by his own voice, saying: I am God; I Moses 3:5.made the world, and TG Man, a Spirit Child of Heavenly Father.men TG Spirit Creation.before they were in the flesh.

And he also said unto him: If thou wilt turn unto me, and hearken unto my voice, and believe, and repent of all thy transgressions, and be 3 Ne. 11:26 (23–26). TG Baptism, Essential.baptized, even in water, in the name of mine Only Begotten Son, who is full of TG Grace.grace and truth, which is TG Jesus Christ, Messiah.Jesus Christ, the only Acts 4:12. TG Jesus Christ, Authority of; Name.name which shall be given under heaven, whereby TG Jesus Christ, Savior; Salvation.salvation shall come unto the children of men, ye shall receive the gift of the Holy Ghost, asking all things in his name, and whatsoever ye shall ask, it shall be given you.

And our father Adam spake unto the Lord, and said: Why is it that men must repent and be baptized in water? And the Lord said unto Adam: Behold I have TG Forgive.forgiven thee thy transgression in the Garden of Eden.

Hence came the saying abroad among the people, that the TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Son of God hath Mosiah 3:16. TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through.atoned for original guilt, wherein the sins of the parents cannot be answered upon the heads of the TG Children.children, for they are TG Salvation of Little Children.whole from the foundation of the world.

And the Lord spake unto Adam, saying: Inasmuch as thy children are TG Conceived in Sin.conceived in sin, even so when they begin to grow up, TG Death, Spiritual, First; Man, Natural, Not Spiritually Reborn.sin conceiveth in their hearts, and they taste the D&C 29:39. TG Opposition.bitter, that they may know to prize the good.

And it is given unto them to know good from evil; wherefore they are Gal. 5:1; 2 Ne. 2:27 (26–27); Hel. 14:30 (29–30). TG Agency.agents unto themselves, and I have given unto you another law and commandment.

Wherefore teach it unto your children, that all men, everywhere, must 1 Cor. 6:9 (9–10); Moses 5:8; 7:10. TG Baptism, Qualifications for; Repent.repent, or they can in nowise inherit the kingdom of God, for no Lev. 15:31. TG Chastity; Cleanliness; God, Perfection of; Modesty; Uncleanness.unclean thing can dwell there, or Ps. 15:1 (1–5); 24:3 (3–4); 27:4; 1 Ne. 10:21; 15:33 (33–36); Mosiah 15:23 (19–26); Morm. 7:7; D&C 76:62 (50–62).dwell in his TG God, Presence of.presence; for, in the language of Adam, Moses 7:35.Man of Holiness is his name, and the name of his Only Begotten is the Matt. 20:28; John 3:13 (13–14).Son of Man, even TG Jesus Christ, Prophecies about.Jesus Christ, a righteous TG God, Justice of; Jesus Christ, Judge.Judge, who shall come in the meridian of time.
Therefore I give unto you a TG Authority.commandment, to TG Education.teach these things freely unto your TG Family, Children, Responsibilities toward.children, saying:

That by reason of transgression cometh the fall, which fall bringeth death, and inasmuch as ye were born into the world by water, and blood, and the 1 Jn. 5:8.spirit, which I have made, and so became of Gen. 2:7; Moses 3:7; 4:25 (25–29); Abr. 5:7.dust a living soul, even so ye must be TG Holy Ghost, Baptism of; Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.born again into the kingdom of heaven, of TG Baptism; Baptism, Essential.water, and of the Spirit, and be cleansed by blood, even the blood of mine Only Begotten; that ye might be sanctified from all sin, and 2 Ne. 4:15 (15–16).enjoy the John 6:68.words of Abr. 2:11.eternal life in this world, and eternal life in the world to come, even immortal TG Celestial Glory; Glory.glory;
For by the Moro. 8:25.water ye keep the commandment; by the Spirit ye are TG Justification.justified, and by the TG Blood, Shedding of; Blood, Symbolism of.blood ye are TG Sanctification.sanctified;

Therefore it is given to abide in you; the TG Holy Ghost, Source of Testimony.record of heaven; the TG Holy Ghost, Comforter.Comforter; the TG Peace of God.peaceable things of immortal glory; the truth of all things; that which quickeneth all things, which maketh alive all things; that which knoweth all things, and hath all TG Jesus Christ, Power of.power according to wisdom, mercy, truth, justice, and judgment.

And now, behold, I say unto you: This is the TG Gospel; Salvation, Plan of.plan of salvation unto all men, through the TG Blood, Symbolism of.blood of mine TG Jesus Christ, Birth of.Only Begotten, who shall come in the meridian of time.

And behold, all things have their Heb. 8:5; D&C 77:2.likeness, and all things are created and made to Alma 30:44; D&C 88:47 (45–47).bear record of me, both things which are temporal, and things which are spiritual; things which are in the heavens above, and things which are on the earth, and things which are in the earth, and things which are under the earth, both above and beneath: all things bear record of me.

And it came to pass, when the Lord had spoken with Adam, our father, that Adam cried unto the Lord, and he was 1 Kgs. 18:12; 2 Kgs. 2:16. TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.caught away by the Spirit of the Lord, and was carried down into the water, and was laid under the TG Baptism, Immersion.water, and was brought forth out of the water.

And thus he was baptized, and the Spirit of God descended upon him, and thus he was TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.born of the Spirit, and became quickened in the Mosiah 27:25; Alma 5:14 (12–15).inner man.

And he heard a voice out of heaven, saying: Thou art baptized with D&C 19:31.fire, and with the Holy Ghost. This is the 2 Ne. 31:18 (17–21); 3 Ne. 28:11.record of the Father, and the Son, from henceforth and forever;
And thou art after the TG Priesthood, Melchizedek.order of him who was without beginning of days or end of years, from all eternity to all eternity.
Behold, thou art John 17:21; 1 Jn. 1:3; D&C 35:2.one in me, a son of God; and thus may all become my John 1:12 (9–13); Mosiah 27:25 (24–26); D&C 34:3. TG Sons and Daughters of God.sons. Amen.

div.p: Enoch teaches, leads the people, and moves mountains—The city of Zion is established—Enoch foresees the coming of the Son of Man, His atoning sacrifice, and the resurrection of the Saints—He foresees the Restoration, the Gathering, the Second Coming, and the return of Zion.

chapter.verse: And it came to pass that Enoch continued his speech, saying: Behold, our father Adam taught these things, and many have believed and become the TG Sons and Daughters of God.sons of God, and many have believed not, and have perished in their sins, and are looking forth with Alma 40:14 (11–14).fear, in torment, for the fiery indignation of the wrath of God to be poured out upon them.

And from that time forth Enoch began to prophesy, saying unto the people, that: As I was journeying, and stood upon the place Mahujah, and cried unto the Lord, there came a voice out of heaven, saying—Turn ye, and get ye upon the mount The Hebrew equivalent of Simeon is Shimʼon, which means “hearing.”Simeon.
And it came to pass that I turned and went up on the mount; and as I stood upon the mount, I beheld the heavens open, and I was clothed upon with TG Transfiguration.glory;

And I TG God, Privilege of Seeing; Jesus Christ, Appearances, Antemortal.saw the Lord; and he stood before my face, and he talked with me, even as a man talketh one with another, Gen. 32:30; Deut. 5:4; Moses 1:11 (2, 11, 31).face to face; and he said unto me: Moses 1:4.Look, and I will TG God, Omniscience of; Revelation.show unto thee the world for the space of many generations.
And it came to pass that I beheld in the valley of Shum, and lo, a great people which dwelt in Moses 5:45; 6:38.tents, which were the people of Shum.
And again the Lord said unto me: Look; and I looked towards the north, and I beheld the people of Abr. 1:21.Canaan, which dwelt in tents.

And the Lord said unto me: Prophesy; and I prophesied, saying: Behold the people of Canaan, which are numerous, shall go forth in battle array against the people of Shum, and shall slay them that they shall utterly be destroyed; and the people of Canaan shall divide themselves in the land, and the land shall be barren and unfruitful, and none other people shall dwell there but the people of Canaan;

For behold, the Lord shall TG Earth, Curse of.curse the land with much heat, and the TG Barren.barrenness thereof shall go forth forever; and there was a 2 Ne. 26:33.blackness came upon all the children of Canaan, that they were despised among all people.

And it came to pass that the Lord said unto me: Look; and I looked, and I beheld the land of Sharon, and the land of Enoch, and the land of Omner, and the land of Heni, and the land of Shem, and the land of Haner, and the land of Hanannihah, and all the inhabitants thereof;
And the Lord said unto me: Go to this people, and say unto them—Moses 5:8; 6:57.Repent, lest I come out and smite them with a curse, and they die.

And he gave unto me a commandment that I should TG Baptism, Essential.baptize in the name of the Father, and of the Son, which is full of TG Grace.grace and truth, and of the Holy Ghost, which beareth record of the Father and the Son.
And it came to pass that Enoch continued to call upon all the people, save it were the people of Canaan, to repent;

And so great was the TG Faith.faith of Enoch that he led the people of God, and their enemies came to battle against them; and he Moses 6:32.spake the word of the Lord, and the earth trembled, and the Matt. 17:20; Luke 17:6 (5–6).mountains fled, even according to his command; and the Moses 6:34.rivers of water were turned out of their course; and the roar of the lions was heard out of the wilderness; and all nations feared greatly, so TG Priesthood, Power of.powerful was the word of Enoch, and so great was the power of the language which God had given him.

There also came 3 Ne. 9:8.up a land out of the depth of the sea, and so great was the fear of the enemies of the people of God, that they fled and stood afar off and went upon the land which came up out of the depth of the sea.
And the Num. 13:33; Moses 8:18.giants of the land, also, stood afar off; and there went forth a Ps. 83:17 (2–17); 2 Ne. 25:14; D&C 71:7.curse upon all people that fought against God;
And from that time forth there were wars and bloodshed among them; but the Lord came and TG God, Presence of.dwelt with his people, and they dwelt in righteousness.

The Ex. 23:27 (27–28); Alma 14:26; D&C 64:43.fear of the Lord was upon all nations, so great was the TG Glory.glory of the Lord, which was upon his people. And the Lord blessed the 1 Chr. 28:8 (7–8); 1 Ne. 2:20.land, and they were blessed upon the mountains, and upon the high places, and did flourish.

And the Lord called his people D&C 38:4. TG Zion. Zion, because they were of 2 Chr. 30:12; Acts 4:32 (31–32); Philip. 2:1–4. TG Unity.one heart and one mind, and dwelt in righteousness; and there was no poor among them.
And Enoch continued his preaching in righteousness unto the people of God. And it came to pass in his days, that he built a city that was called the City of Holiness, even Zion.

And it came to pass that Enoch talked with the Lord; and he said unto the Lord: Surely Moses 7:63 (62–63). TG Jerusalem, New.Zion shall dwell in safety forever. But the Lord said unto Enoch: Zion have I blessed, but the Moses 7:28.residue of the people have I cursed.

And it came to pass that the Lord showed unto Enoch all the inhabitants of the earth; and he beheld, and lo, Moses 7:31.Zion, in process of time, was Moses 7:47, 69.taken up into heaven. And the Lord said unto Enoch: Behold mine abode forever.

And Enoch also beheld the residue of the people which were the sons of Adam; and they were a mixture of all the seed of Adam save it was the seed of Cain, for the seed of Cain were 2 Ne. 26:33.black, and had not place among them.
And after that Zion was taken up into TG Heaven.heaven, Enoch TG Vision.beheld, and lo, D&C 88:47 (45–47); Moses 1:28 (27–29); Abr. 3:21 (21–23).all the nations of the earth were before him;

And there came generation upon generation; and Enoch was high and 2 Cor. 12:2 (1–4).lifted up, even in the bosom of the Father, and of the Son of Man; and behold, the power of Satan was upon all the face of the earth.
And he saw angels descending out of heaven; and he heard a loud voice saying: Wo, wo be unto the inhabitants of the earth.

And he beheld Satan; and he had a great Prov. 5:22; 2 Tim. 2:26 (24–26); Alma 12:11 (10–11).chain in his hand, and it veiled the whole face of the earth with Isa. 60:2 (1–3); Alma 10:25; 14:6; Moses 6:27.darkness; and he looked up and Moses 5:21.laughed, and his 2 Pet. 2:4; Jude 1:6; D&C 29:37 (36–45).angels rejoiced.

And Enoch beheld TG Angels.angels descending out of heaven, bearing TG Testimony.testimony of the Father and Son; and the Holy Ghost fell on many, and they were caught up by the powers of heaven into Zion.

And it came to pass that the God of heaven looked upon the Moro. 7:32; Moses 7:20.residue of the people, and he wept; and Enoch bore record of it, saying: How is it that the heavens weep, and shed forth their tears as the rain upon the mountains?
And Enoch said unto the Lord: How is it that thou canst Isa. 63:9 (7–10).weep, seeing thou art holy, and from all eternity to all eternity?

And were it possible that man could number the particles of the earth, yea, millions of Job 9:9 (7–9); Ps. 8:3 (3–4); D&C 76:24; Moses 1:33. TG Astronomy.earths like this, it would not be a beginning to the number of thy TG Creation.creations; and thy curtains are stretched out still; and yet thou art there, and thy bosom is there; and also thou art just; thou art merciful and kind forever;

And thou hast taken Moses 7:21.Zion to thine own bosom, from all thy creations, from all eternity to all eternity; and naught but peace, TG God, Justice of.justice, and truth is the habitation of thy throne; and mercy shall go before thy face and have no end; how is it thou canst Moses 7:37 (37, 40).weep?

The Lord said unto Enoch: Behold these thy brethren; they are the workmanship of mine own Moses 1:4.hands, and I gave unto them their TG God, Intelligence of; Knowledge.knowledge, in the day I created them; and in the Garden of Eden, gave I unto man his TG Agency.agency;

And unto thy brethren have I said, and also given commandment, that they should TG Love.love one another, and that they should choose me, their Father; but behold, they are without affection, and they Gen. 6:11. TG Hate.hate their own blood;

And the Num. 11:1 (1, 10); D&C 35:14.fire of mine Ps. 106:40.indignation is kindled against them; and in my hot displeasure will I send in the Gen. 7:10 (4, 10); Moses 8:17 (17, 24). TG Flood.floods upon them, for my fierce anger is kindled against them.
Behold, I am God; Moses 6:57.Man of Holiness is my name; Man of Counsel is my name; and Endless and Eternal is my Ex. 3:15; Moses 1:3.name, also.

Wherefore, I can stretch forth mine hands and hold all the D&C 38:2; 88:41; Moses 1:35 (35–37). TG God, Omniscience of.creations which I have made; and mine eye can pierce them also, and among all the workmanship of mine hands there has not been so great Gen. 6:5 (5–6); 3 Ne. 9:9; Morm. 4:12 (10–12); D&C 112:23; Moses 8:22 (22, 28–30).wickedness as among thy brethren.

But behold, their sins shall be upon the heads of their fathers; Satan shall be their father, and misery shall be their doom; and the whole heavens shall weep over them, even all the workmanship of mine hands; wherefore should not the heavens weep, seeing these shall suffer?
But behold, these which thine eyes are upon shall perish in the floods; and behold, I will shut them up; a 1 Pet. 3:20 (18–21). TG Spirits in Prison.prison have I prepared for them.

And IE the Savior.that which I have chosen hath pled before my face. Wherefore, he Ezek. 33:11.suffereth for their sins; inasmuch as they will repent in the day that my Moses 4:2; Abr. 3:27.Chosen shall return unto me, and until that day they shall be in TG Damnation.torment;
Wherefore, for this shall the heavens weep, yea, and all the workmanship of mine hands.

And it came to pass that the Lord spake unto Enoch, and TG God, Omniscience of.told Enoch all the doings of the children of men; wherefore Enoch knew, and looked upon their wickedness, and their misery, and wept and stretched forth his arms, and his Mosiah 28:3. TG Compassion.heart swelled wide as eternity; and his bowels yearned; and all eternity shook.
And Enoch also saw Noah, and his Gen. 8:16; Moses 8:12.family; that the posterity of all the sons of Noah should be saved with a temporal salvation;

Wherefore Enoch saw that Noah built an Gen. 6:14–22; Ether 6:7 (6–8).ark; and that the Lord smiled upon it, and held it in his own hand; but upon the residue of the wicked the TG Flood; Punish.floods came and swallowed them up.

And as Enoch saw this, he had Job 10:1; Isa. 38:15.bitterness of soul, and wept over his brethren, and said unto the heavens: I will refuse to be Ps. 77:2; Ether 15:3.comforted; but the Lord said unto Enoch: Lift up your heart, and be glad; and look.

And it came to pass that Enoch looked; and from Noah, he beheld all the families of the earth; and he cried unto the Lord, saying: When shall the day of the Lord come? When shall the blood of the Righteous be shed, that all they that mourn may be TG Sanctification.sanctified and have eternal life?
And the Lord said: It shall be in the Moses 5:57.meridian of time, in the days of wickedness and vengeance.

And behold, Enoch TG Jesus Christ, Appearances, Antemortal.saw the day of the coming of the Son of Man, even in the flesh; and his soul rejoiced, saying: The Righteous is lifted up, and the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God; Passover.Lamb is slain from the foundation of the world; and through TG Faith.faith I am in the bosom of the Father, and behold, Moses 7:21.Zion is with me.

And it came to pass that Enoch looked upon the TG Earth, Purpose of.earth; and he heard a voice from the bowels thereof, saying: Wo, wo is me, the mother of men; I am TG Pain.pained, I am weary, because of the wickedness of my children. When shall I Moses 7:64 (54, 58, 64).rest, and be TG Earth, Cleansing of.cleansed from the TG Filthiness.filthiness which is gone forth out of me? When will my Creator sanctify me, that I may rest, and righteousness for a season abide upon my face?
And when Enoch heard the earth mourn, he wept, and cried unto the Lord, saying: O Lord, wilt thou not have compassion upon the earth? Wilt thou not bless the children of Noah?

And it came to pass that Enoch continued his cry unto the Lord, saying: I ask thee, O Lord, in the name of thine Only Begotten, even Jesus Christ, that thou wilt have mercy upon Noah and his seed, that the earth might never more be covered by the TG Flood.floods.
And the Lord could not withhold; and he Moses 7:60.covenanted with Enoch, and sware unto him with an oath, that he would stay the Ps. 104:9.floods; that he would call upon the children of Noah;
And he sent forth an unalterable decree, that a Moses 8:2.remnant of his seed should always be found among all nations, while the earth should stand;

And the Lord said: Blessed is he through whose seed Messiah shall come; for he saith—I am TG Jesus Christ, Messiah.Messiah, the Matt. 2:2; 2 Ne. 10:14; Alma 5:50; D&C 128:22 (22–23).King of Zion, the Ps. 71:3; 78:35; Hel. 5:12. TG Cornerstone; Rock.Rock of Heaven, which is broad as TG Eternity.eternity; whoso cometh in at the gate and 2 Ne. 31:19 (19–20).climbeth up by me shall never fall; wherefore, blessed are they of whom I have spoken, for they shall come forth with TG Singing.songs of everlasting TG Joy.joy.
And it came to pass that Enoch cried unto the Lord, saying: When the Son of Man cometh in the flesh, shall the earth rest? I pray thee, show me these things.

And the Lord said unto Enoch: Look, and he looked and beheld the TG Jesus Christ, Prophecies about.Son of Man lifted up on the 3 Ne. 27:14. TG Jesus Christ, Crucifixion of.cross, after the manner of men;

And he heard a loud voice; and the heavens were TG Veil.veiled; and all the creations of God mourned; and the earth Matt. 27:51 (45, 50–51).groaned; and the rocks were rent; and the TG Saints.saints arose, and were TG Exaltation.crowned at the Matt. 25:34.right hand of the Son of Man, with crowns of glory;

And as many of the TG Spirits, Disembodied.spirits as were in D&C 76:73 (71–74); 88:99. TG Salvation for the Dead; Spirits in Prison.prison came forth, and stood on the right hand of God; and the remainder were reserved in chains of darkness until the judgment of the great day.
And again Enoch wept and cried unto the Lord, saying: When shall the earth Dan. 12:8 (8–13).rest?

And Enoch beheld the Son of Man ascend up unto the Father; and he called unto the Lord, saying: Wilt thou not come again upon the earth? Forasmuch as thou art God, and I know thee, and thou hast sworn unto me, and commanded me that I should ask in the name of thine Only Begotten; thou hast made me, and given unto me a right to thy throne, and not of myself, but through thine own grace; wherefore, I ask thee if thou wilt not come again on the earth.

And the Lord said unto Enoch: As I live, even so will I come in the TG Last Days.last days, in the days of wickedness and vengeance, to fulfil the Moses 7:51.oath which I have made unto you concerning the children of Noah;

And the day shall come that the earth shall TG Rest.rest, but before that day the heavens shall be Micah 3:6; D&C 38:11 (11–12); 112:23.darkened, and a TG Veil.veil of darkness shall cover the earth; and the heavens shall shake, and also the earth; and great tribulations shall be among the children of men, but my people will I 1 Ne. 22:17 (15–22); 2 Ne. 30:10. TG Protection, Divine.preserve;

And TG Righteousness.righteousness will I send down out of heaven; and truth will I send forth out of the earth, to bear TG Testimony.testimony of mine Only Begotten; his TG Jesus Christ, Resurrection.resurrection from the dead; yea, and also the resurrection of all men; and righteousness and truth will I cause to sweep the earth as with a flood, to TG Israel, Gathering of.gather out mine elect from the four quarters of the earth, unto a place which I shall prepare, an Holy City, that my people may gird up their loins, and be looking forth for the time of my coming; for there shall be my tabernacle, and it shall be called TG Zion.Zion, a TG Jerusalem, New.New Jerusalem.

And the Lord said unto Enoch: Then shalt thou and all thy Rev. 21:10 (9–11); D&C 45:12 (11–12); Moses 7:20 (20–21).city meet them there, and we will Rev. 14:13 (12–13).receive them into our bosom, and they shall see us; and we will fall upon their necks, and they shall fall upon our necks, and we will kiss each other;

And there shall be mine abode, and it shall be Zion, which shall come forth out of all the creations which I have made; and for the space of a TG Millennium.thousand years the TG Earth, Destiny of.earth shall Moses 7:48. TG Earth, Purpose of.rest.
And it came to pass that Enoch saw the 1 Cor. 5:5.day of the Jude 1:14.coming of the Son of Man, in the last days, to dwell on the earth in righteousness for the space of a thousand years;
